sources.title: The Lookalike (KRIMI THRILLER ganzer Film, neue Filme 2022, ganze Krimis in voller Länge, Film Noir)

metadata.Plot: Drug lord William Spinks has a curious obsession with Sadie Hill and uses family friends Bobby and Frank to get to her. But when Sadie's death jeopardizes a major deal, Bobby and Frank set out to find a replacement, a lookalike to fool Spinks. The shady plan propels an ex-basketball champion, a deaf beauty, an addict, and an aspiring actress into an unlikely romance and a desperate quest to start over.
metadata.Actors: Justin Long, Jerry O'Connell, John Corbett
